allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: constraint-aware adversarial training using project_constraints

adversarial_train_step now accepts optional schema, feature_names,
feature_types params. When provided, applies project_constraints after
each PGD step to keep adversarial examples within domain bounds.
NeuralModel threads these params through from its config dict.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: input validation with outlier detection, sanitise/reject modes

InputValidator now supports mode=''sanitise'' \(clip outliers to z*std\)
and mode=''reject'' \(flag outliers\). fit\(\) computes per-feature mean/std.
Backward compatible: works without fit\(\) for basic bound clipping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
